meaning: n.带,皮带vt.用带缚住,用带捆扎
examples: He looped the strap over his shoulder.
Nancy gripped the strap of her beach bag.
She pulled the strap of her nightgown onto her shoulder.
Strap a gargoyle on the corner and you would think you were in baroque Europe.
Strap in, folks, 2012 may be much more interesting and close than we'd imagined.
